metadata.description: Extract ACP client implementation from crates/nexus42/src/acp/ into new crates/nexus-acp-host crate (worker-only linkage; enforced by CI gate verify-no-acp-in-daemon). Ship nexus42 acp-worker hidden subcommand stub for WS2 to grow into the JSON-RPC loop. Wave-0 spec: acp-client-tech-spec-v2.md §11.
commits: e361b5a refactor(acp-host): move ACP modules to nexus-acp-host (WS1 T2-T5)
a2fcfe9 refactor(nexus42): consume nexus-acp-host via compat shim (WS1 T6)
ef36312 ci(verify-no-acp-in-daemon): enforce nexus42d linkage matrix (WS1 T9)

plans.title: V1.4 WS2 — Orchestration skeleton (engine + capability registry + worker manager + _system.maintenance)

metadata.description: New crate crates/nexus-orchestration. OrchestrationEngine trait + GraphFlowEngine adapter over graph-flow=0.2.3, SqliteSessionStorage, Capability trait + non-ACP built-ins (sync/outbox/workspace/registry/creator.{read,write,inject}/judge.rule), WorkerManager + stdin/stdout JSON-RPC IPC, _system.maintenance hardcoded graph, /v1/local/orchestration/* HTTP. ACP-touching capabilities + preset file loader deferred to WS3.

plans.title: V1.4 WS3 — Preset loader + novel-writing end-to-end

metadata.description: YAML -> graph-flow::Graph loader + validation, ACP-touching capabilities (acp.prompt/acp.session_load/judge.llm), full AcpPromptTask + InnerGraphTask impls, embedded novel-writing preset (4 states + 2 inner graphs), mocked-agent E2E test across all states + daemon-restart durability. Minimal nexus42 schedule start/status/advance CLI (WS7 grows this).

plans.title: V1.4 WS4 — statig daemon lifecycle HSM (TD-9 closure)

metadata.description: Replace nexus42d's single-state 'running-probe' with the full 6-state statig HSM (Stopped/Starting/Running/Degraded/Stopping/Failed). Expose the v2 GET /v1/local/daemon/status superset response (schema_version: 2, subsystems{}, degraded{}) wire-compatible with the v1 probe. Closes TD-9.
metadata.parallelism: parallel with WS2 (no file overlap except crates/nexus42d/src/main.rs touch)

plans.title: V1.4 WS5 — schemas/ boundary refactor (wire vs local)

metadata.description: Audit every schemas/**/*.schema.json, classify as wire (kept) or local (moved to crates/nexus-contracts/src/local/ as hand-written Rust — no codegen). Regenerate contracts (deletions only), bump @42ch/nexus-contracts minor, post cross-repo handoff note. Per schemas-boundary-v1 §2 rule (platform HTTP observability).

plans.title: V1.4 WS6 — V1.3 Creator Register E2E integration tests (backlog closure)

metadata.description: Close the legacy V1.3 Todo row (formerly 2026-04-17-v1.3-creator-register-e2e-tests). wiremock-driven E2E for creator register -> challenge solve -> verify -> credential store. Happy path + negative paths (bad challenge, verify reject, no-credential-leak-on-failure) + idempotency guard.
metadata.dependency: platform M10 (creator register + verify API reachable in test environment; mocked here via wiremock)
metadata.supersedes: 2026-04-17-v1.3-creator-register-e2e-tests (prior Todo row; this plan is the V1.4 work item that closes it)

plans.title: V1.4 WS7 — Creator Schedule + immutable versioned core_context

metadata.description: Multi-Schedule per creator (concurrency declared per-add; serial default), CRUD over prompts by ID, immutable versioned core_context (Seed + UserEdit + PresetHook + PresetSeedExpansion; LlmSummarize reserved for V1.5 zero-migration). 13 CLI subcommands under nexus42 schedule + 8 HTTP endpoints under /v1/local/orchestration/schedules/*. Answers OQ-1..OQ-6 from orchestration-engine-v1 §11.
